title: dacryodes froesiana
intro: Dacryodes froesiana, also known as the froesiana tree or Kamani, is a species of plant in the family Burseraceae. The medicinal properties of Dacryodes froesiana include its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Dacryodes froesiana is often prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat various health conditions.
